name: feima-lab-content-manager
description: Dev-time manifest only. The skill ships ZERO runtime dependencies — scripts/render.mjs is a pre-bundled, self-contained file. These devDependencies are ONLY needed for running tests (node --test tests/) or regenerating the bundle (node build-bundle.mjs).

scripts.test: node --test tests/base-styles.test.mjs tests/escape-html.test.mjs tests/renderer-callout.test.mjs tests/renderer-compare-card.test.mjs tests/renderer-timeline.test.mjs tests/renderer-code-tabs.test.mjs tests/renderer-collapse.test.mjs tests/renderer-image-carousel.test.mjs tests/renderer-playground.test.mjs tests/renderer-registry.test.mjs tests/mdx-parser.test.mjs tests/interactive-js.test.mjs tests/render-e2e.test.mjs tests/new-post.test.mjs tests/image-localize.test.mjs
